text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, starting my day with a glass of water and a short stretch. After a quick shower, I have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. By 8 a.m., I’m at my desk for work, focusing on tasks until lunchtime. I make sure to take a 30-minute walk in the afternoon for exercise—it helps me stay energized. In the evening, I wind down by cooking dinner, reading a book, or watching a show. I’m usually in bed by 10 p.m. This routine keeps me balanced and productive. Consistency is key to making it work.
